requirement_topic.en: EPRA Licensing and Regulatory Route for Grid-Connected Solar PV
requirement_topic.zh: 并网太阳能光伏的 EPRA 许可与监管路径
requirement_topic.zht: 併網太陽能光伏的 EPRA 許可與監管路徑

summary.en: EPRA is Kenya's electricity and renewable-energy regulator and publishes electricity and renewable-energy regulatory instruments and application guidelines. A solar PV inverter is not cleared for a grid-connected project merely by import PVoC; the project developer or customer must still follow the applicable EPRA licence, exemption, registration, net-metering, tariff, and technical-regulatory route for the generating facility and use case. User-supplied flags for the Energy (Net-Metering) Regulations, 2024 (Legal Notice No. 104) should be verified against EPRA or Kenya Power before relying on stated capacity limits or credit values.
summary.zh: EPRA 是肯尼亚电力和可再生能源监管机构，并发布电力及可再生能源监管文件和申请指南。太阳能光伏逆变器取得进口 PVoC 并不等于可直接用于并网项目；项目开发方或客户仍须根据发电设施和使用场景，遵循适用的 EPRA 许可、豁免、登记、净计量、电价及技术监管路径。用户提供的 Energy (Net-Metering) Regulations, 2024（Legal Notice No. 104）标记，应在依赖相关容量上限或抵扣数值前向 EPRA 或 Kenya Power 核实。
summary.zht: EPRA 是肯亞電力和可再生能源監管機構，並發布電力及可再生能源監管文件和申請指南。太陽能光伏逆變器取得進口 PVoC 並不等於可直接用於併網專案；專案開發方或客戶仍須根據發電設施和使用場景，遵循適用的 EPRA 許可、豁免、登記、淨計量、電價及技術監管路徑。使用者提供的 Energy (Net-Metering) Regulations, 2024（Legal Notice No. 104）標記，應在依賴相關容量上限或抵扣數值前向 EPRA 或 Kenya Power 核實。

standards_or_laws: Energy (Net-Metering) Regulations, 2024 (Legal Notice No. 104) - verify current text before relying on user-supplied 4 kW single-phase, 10 kW three-phase, 1 MW commercial/industrial, or approximate 50% retail-tariff credit figures
EPRA electricity regulatory instruments and application guidelines
EPRA renewable-energy regulatory instruments and application guidelines

summary.en: Chinese domestic grid acceptance is normally handled through Chinese grid-company and project rules, with documents such as GB/T 19964-2024, GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and utility-specific settings. Those records do not establish EPRA licensing status or Kenya project eligibility.
summary.zh: 中国国内并网验收通常依据中国电网企业和项目规则，并使用 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 及电网企业特定参数等文件。这些记录不能证明 EPRA 许可状态或肯尼亚项目资格。
summary.zht: 中國國內併網驗收通常依據中國電網企業和專案規則，並使用 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 及電網企業特定參數等文件。這些記錄不能證明 EPRA 許可狀態或肯亞專案資格。

gap.en: The project gap is regulatory ownership. Confirm whether the Kenya installation is captive, embedded, distributed, commercial, utility-scale, or exempt; then align inverter anti-islanding, protection, metering, and commissioning evidence to the EPRA route and connection authority.
gap.zh: 项目差距在于监管归属。应确认肯尼亚安装属于自备、嵌入式、分布式、商业、公共事业规模或豁免项目；随后将逆变器防孤岛、保护、计量和调试证据对齐 EPRA 路径及接入主管方要求。
gap.zht: 專案差距在於監管歸屬。應確認肯亞安裝屬於自備、嵌入式、分散式、商業、公用事業規模或豁免專案；隨後將逆變器防孤島、保護、計量和調試證據對齊 EPRA 路徑及接入主管方要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the Energy Act, EPRA licensing rules, tariff rules, or project approval route applies; may be exempt or registration-based for smaller systems depending on current EPRA rules
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for Kenya projects; Chinese domestic grid approvals do not replace EPRA review

source.publisher: Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA), Kenya

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Separate the product import file from the Kenya project approval file. EPRA and the connection authority decide the grid-connected use case; a PVoC CoC alone does not approve generation or export to the grid.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将产品进口文件与肯尼亚项目批准文件分开处理。并网使用场景由 EPRA 和接入主管方决定；PVoC CoC 本身不批准发电或向电网送电。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將產品進口文件與肯亞專案批准文件分開處理。併網使用場景由 EPRA 和接入主管方決定；PVoC CoC 本身不批准發電或向電網送電。

requirement_topic.en: Kenya Power Connection and Net-Metering Readiness
requirement_topic.zh: Kenya Power 接入与净计量准备
requirement_topic.zht: Kenya Power 接入與淨計量準備

summary.en: Kenya Power is the national distribution utility and the practical connection counterparty for many customer-side PV systems. Net-metering or export arrangements require the applicable EPRA framework, Kenya Power connection review, metering arrangement, protection settings, and commissioning acceptance. The Energy (Net-Metering) Regulations, 2024 (Legal Notice No. 104) and user-supplied figures such as 4 kW single-phase, 10 kW three-phase, 1 MW commercial/industrial, and an approximate 50% retail-tariff credit should be treated as verification points unless the current EPRA/Kenya Power text is in the project file. An inverter should therefore have anti-islanding, export-control, protection, and meter-interface documentation ready for the site-specific application.
summary.zh: Kenya Power 是肯尼亚国家配电公用事业公司，也是许多用户侧光伏系统的实际接入相对方。净计量或反送电安排需要适用的 EPRA 框架、Kenya Power 接入审查、计量安排、保护参数和调试验收。Energy (Net-Metering) Regulations, 2024（Legal Notice No. 104）以及用户提供的 4 kW 单相、10 kW 三相、1 MW 工商业和约 50% 零售电价抵扣等数值，应作为核实点处理，除非项目文件已纳入现行 EPRA/Kenya Power 文本。因此，逆变器应为具体场站申请准备防孤岛、限发/反送控制、保护和计量接口文件。
summary.zht: Kenya Power 是肯亞國家配電公用事業公司，也是許多用戶側光伏系統的實際接入相對方。淨計量或反送電安排需要適用的 EPRA 框架、Kenya Power 接入審查、計量安排、保護參數和調試驗收。Energy (Net-Metering) Regulations, 2024（Legal Notice No. 104）以及使用者提供的 4 kW 單相、10 kW 三相、1 MW 工商業和約 50% 零售電價抵扣等數值，應作為核實點處理，除非專案文件已納入現行 EPRA/Kenya Power 文本。因此，逆變器應為具體場站申請準備防孤島、限發／反送控制、保護和計量介面文件。

standards_or_laws: Kenya Power customer connection and supply procedures
Energy (Net-Metering) Regulations, 2024 (Legal Notice No. 104) - current eligibility, capacity limits, and credit formula should be verified with EPRA or Kenya Power
EPRA net-metering, tariff, and renewable-energy framework where applicable
Site-specific interconnection agreement, metering arrangement, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China grid-connection reports may demonstrate anti-islanding and protection functions, but their default voltage, frequency, reconnect, ramp-rate, and export-control settings may not match the Kenya Power site. Kenya-specific parameter sheets and commissioning records should be prepared separately.
summary.zh: 中国并网报告可证明防孤岛和保护功能，但其默认电压、频率、重连、爬坡率及反送控制参数可能不匹配 Kenya Power 场站。应单独准备肯尼亚专用参数表和调试记录。
summary.zht: 中國併網報告可證明防孤島和保護功能，但其預設電壓、頻率、重連、爬坡率及反送控制參數可能不匹配 Kenya Power 場站。應單獨準備肯亞專用參數表和調試記錄。

gap.en: The connection gap is site-specific settings. Prepare Kenya Power-facing single-line diagrams, inverter protection settings, anti-islanding test evidence, export limitation logic where required, meter wiring diagrams, and installer commissioning forms.
gap.zh: 接入差距在于场站特定参数。应准备面向 Kenya Power 的单线图、逆变器保护参数、防孤岛测试证据、适用时的限发/反送逻辑、计量接线图及安装商调试表。
gap.zht: 接入差距在於場站特定參數。應準備面向 Kenya Power 的單線圖、逆變器保護參數、防孤島測試證據、適用時的限發／反送邏輯、計量接線圖及安裝商調試表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection, export, or net-metering only where the site seeks those arrangements; off-grid or non-export systems may follow different electrical and customer requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid approval is not accepted as Kenya Power connection approval

source.publisher: Kenya Power and Lighting Company PLC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not ship with only a generic grid certificate if the Kenya project will export power. Build a Kenya Power and EPRA connection pack with model-specific protection, anti-islanding, metering, and commissioning evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 如果肯尼亚项目将向电网送电，不应只凭通用并网证书出货。应建立面向 Kenya Power 和 EPRA 的接入资料包，包含型号级保护、防孤岛、计量和调试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 如果肯亞專案將向電網送電，不應只憑通用併網證書出貨。應建立面向 Kenya Power 和 EPRA 的接入資料包，包含型號級保護、防孤島、計量和調試證據。
